sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93806" key="shmato/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σημᾰτ-όεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, (<sense id="n93806.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σῆμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of tombs</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χθών</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.628</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
